headline: VIG Investors: Watch the 10-Year Treasury Yield This Week—4.75% Is the Danger Line
summary: The Vanguard Dividend Appreciation Index Fund ETF Shares (NYSEARCA:VIG) is having a quieter year than its big-cap dividend-growth reputation suggests, with shares around $229 and a 5% year-to-date gain trailing the broader market. The 12-month picture is stronger at almost 17%, but the recent flattening tells you something important: VIG’s dividend-growth playbook is being squeezed ... VIG Investors: Watch the 10-Year Treasury Yield This Week—4.75% Is the Danger Line

headline: How The Bright Horizons (BFAM) Narrative Is Shifting With New Targets And Buybacks
summary: The updated fair value estimate for Bright Horizons Family Solutions has shifted from US$97.11 to US$92.56, alongside several Street price target trims of about US$5, US$10, and US$12 at firms such as JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs. These revisions track with analysts recalibrating their models as they rethink how much investors may be willing to pay for the stock based on revised growth expectations. As you read on, you will see how these changing targets fit into the broader analyst narrative...

headline: How The Choice Hotels (CHH) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Valuation Assumptions
summary: Choice Hotels International has seen its modeled fair value trimmed slightly to US$112.53 from US$114.13, signaling a small reset in where some analysts think the stock could reasonably trade. This shift sits alongside a mix of higher and lower price targets across the Street, as bullish and bearish analysts weigh growth potential against concerns tied to sector risks and company execution. As you read on, you will see how to track these evolving calls and what they might mean for your own...

headline: JPMorgan Announces Cash Distributions for the JPMorgan ETFs
summary: TORONTO, May 25, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- J. P. Morgan Asset Management (JPMAM)* today announced the final May 2026 cash distributions for the below listed JPMorgan ETFs. The JPMorgan ETFs trade on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX). Unitholders of record on June 1, 2026 will receive cash distributions payable on June 5, 2026. Details of the “per unit” distributions are as follows: JPMorgan ETF nameTicker symbolDistribution perunit ($)Payment frequencyJPMorgan US EquityPremium Income ActiveETFJEPI

headline: Warner Music Group (WMG) Valuation Check After Strong Q1 Beat And Upgraded Earnings Outlook
summary: Warner Music Group (WMG) stock has been in focus after the company reported Q1 revenue growth of 16.7% year on year, beating analyst expectations by 7.5%, with the shares up 11.6% since the release. headline: How The Jet2 (AIM:JET2) Investment Narrative Is Shifting With Reset Analyst Expectations
summary: Jet2’s central fair value estimate has been cut from £16.34 to £14.45, an adjustment of about 11.6% that resets where analysts see the stock’s midpoint worth. Recent research from firms including JPMorgan, Morgan Stanley and Deutsche Bank now clusters price targets in a tighter £13.25 to £14.00 range, with several retaining Neutral or Equal Weight style ratings rather than shifting to outright positive stances. As you read on, you will see how this reset in targets fits into the broader story...

headline: Is the Stock Market Open Today? Here Are the Trading Hours for Memorial Day.
summary: As millions of Americans hit the road for Memorial Day weekend, investors are welcoming the chance to slow down.  The holiday follows a chaotic week driven by quarterly earnings from artificial-intelligence giant  Nvidia  and a flurry of excitement around quantum computing stocks.  Is the Stock Market Open or Closed on Memorial Day?

headline: How The Smiths Group (LSE:SMIN) Investment Story Is Shifting As Price Targets Are Reset
summary: The latest analyst work on Smiths Group points to a small reset in price targets, with key fair value moving from £28.11 to £27.90 and several Street targets now sitting in the 2,700 GBp to 2,810 GBp range. These tweaks reflect a blend of optimism from firms like JPMorgan, which keeps an Overweight rating while trimming its target to 2,810 GBp, and more cautious moves such as a cut to 2,700 GBp alongside a shift to Neutral. As you read on, you will see how these target changes shape the...
